problem id: 7c27d6df
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  10010111 -> 01001111
  00010010 -> 00111011
  01111100 -> 00111110
  11100111 -> 11111011
  01001111 -> 00110111
  00110100 -> 00111010
  11010100 -> 11111010
  11100101 -> 01110010
  11010101 -> 11111110
  10011001 -> 11111101

query: 01011010
predicted answer: 00101101
